plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to eliminate their risk.
Trim SMH to reduce overall semiconductor exposure, which is in a downtrend.
Reduce SPY to meet the single name concentration limit and free up capital.
Increase QQQI to boost income generation and stability.
Add XLV, a defensive sector, for broader diversification and lower volatility.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a significant cash buffer.
conservative.read: This plan aims for lower, steadier returns around 1.5% per month, focusing on capital preservation. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk, accepting lower growth potential.

plan: Trim SOXL to keep leveraged ETF exposure minimal.
Reduce SPY to meet the single name concentration mandate.
Trim SMH to lower exposure to the downtrending semiconductor sector.
Increase QQQ for broader market exposure and growth potential.
Add LRCX and GOOGL, strong scanner setups, for balanced risk/reward.
This approach blends index exposure with quality growth names and limited leverage.
balanced.read: This plan targets approximately 2.5% monthly returns by balancing growth with risk management. It reduces concentration and leverage while adding quality names, aiming for steady progress.

plan: Trim SPY to meet the single name concentration limit.
Reduce QQQI to shift focus from income to aggressive growth.
Trim SMH to reduce exposure to the downtrending semiconductor sector.
Increase SOXL to leverage strong upside potential in semiconductors.
Add ASML and GEV, high-scoring scanner setups, for concentrated growth.
Add XLK to capture upside in the tech sector via a strong scanner read.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets higher returns around 4% monthly by leaning into leverage and concentration. It accepts significantly higher drawdown risk and the daily decay of leveraged ETFs. Strict stop discipline is critical.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to remove high risk.
Trim CRWD and SMH to reduce exposure to volatile growth and tech sectors.
Significantly increase QQQI to maximize income generation from distributions.
Maintain SPY for stability and broad market exposure, contributing to income.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly income and capital preservation over growth.
A larger cash buffer will be maintained to support income generation.
income.read: This plan focuses on generating stable monthly income, targeting around 1% per month. It prioritizes income-producing assets and broad market stability while minimizing volatility and growth potential. Distributions are not guaranteed.
